---
title: "Real-Data Ensemble — Collect Results"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

This workbook consolidates staged task outputs for a completed real-data
ensemble job and validates the final artifact inventory.

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
here::i_am("vignettes/real data pipeline/collect_results_workbook_real_data_ensemble.Rmd")
library(here)
library(devtools)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)

susine_path <- here("..", "susine")
if (file.exists(file.path(susine_path, "DESCRIPTION"))) {
  options(test_susine.local_susine_path = normalizePath(susine_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  devtools::load_all(susine_path)
}
devtools::load_all(".")
```

# 1. User Configuration

```{r config}
job_name <- "real_data_ensemble_geometric_n20"
parent_job_id <- "REPLACE_WITH_SLURM_JOB_ID"
output_root <- here("output")

if (identical(parent_job_id, "REPLACE_WITH_SLURM_JOB_ID")) {
  stop("Set parent_job_id to the SLURM job id returned by sbatch before collecting.")
}
```

# 2. Inspect Staging

```{r staging}
file_index <- test_susine::index_staging_outputs(
  job_name = job_name,
  parent_job_id = parent_job_id,
  output_root = output_root
)

file_index %>%
  dplyr::count(type)
```

# 3. Collect

```{r collect}
collected <- test_susine::collect_real_data_results(
  job_name = job_name,
  parent_job_id = parent_job_id,
  output_root = output_root,
  validate = TRUE
)

collected$output_dir
```

# 4. Validate Outputs

```{r validate}
validation <- test_susine::validate_real_data_outputs(collected$output_dir)

validation$ok
kable(validation$checks)
```

# 5. Inventory Preview

```{r inventory}
inventory <- readr::read_csv(
  file.path(collected$output_dir, "metric_inventory.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

kable(inventory)
```
